report.summary: Cycle-close v6: No new commits since last cycle (cb65a9d still HEAD, Day 42 publish). 397 published slugs, 2 in queue (Cross-Chain Interoperability + DAO Governance guides). 104 published slugs missing page.tsx — legacy gap unchanged. TS errors confined to 2 files (structured-data.examples.ts + crypto-index-funds page). All 6 API routes structurally sound with proper cache TTLs. Rate limiting still absent on all public data routes. Git locks persist (24h+), 556 uncommitted files blocked. FOMC decision expected tomorrow 2pm ET.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: No new commits this cycle — HEAD remains cb65a9d (Day 42 publish: 5 pages promoted)

TypeScript errors: 42 errors across 2 files — src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (syntax issues with generics) and src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx. Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors: true
Published pages audit: 397 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 104 missing corresponding page.tsx files (unchanged from previous cycles — these are queued content stubs)
Publish queue contains 2 pages: Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide 2026 + DAO Governance & Voting Guide 2026 (built this cycle by build-v6)
No regressions detected since last cycle

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes have proper cache architecture: prices (60s TTL), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (variable)
Cache-Control headers correctly set with stale-while-revalidate on all routes
Fallback data: market-dominance has explicit FALLBACK_DATA, prices has stale cache fallback. trending, fear-greed, and defi-yields lack explicit hardcoded fallbacks — low-risk but gap noted
Rate limiting (checkRateLimit) not applied to any of the 6 public API routes — persistent gap since previous cycles. Risk of abuse on high-traffic routes like /api/prices
No rate limit hits or stale data incidents detected this cycle (no new deploys to change behavior)

sections.title: DevOps
items: next.config.ts settings correct: standalone output, trailingSlash, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency: 4, workerThreads: false, ignoreBuildErrors: true
Middleware active (127 lines) — handles X-Robots-Tag, cache headers, security headers
CRITICAL: Git locks (.git/index.lock + .git/HEAD.lock) still present — now 24+ hours stale. 556 uncommitted files blocked from being pushed to remote
No deploy possible until git locks cleared and files committed/pushed. Vercel is serving whatever was last pushed, NOT the current local state
FOMC decision tomorrow 2pm ET — high search volume expected for crypto content. Deploy gap means new guides (Cross-Chain, DAO Governance, DeFi Insurance, Airdrop Farming) are not live

sections.title: Project Manager
items: This cycle: No new code shipped (no commits). Build-v6 created 2 new learn guides (Cross-Chain Interoperability + DAO Governance). These are in local files only, not deployed.
Carry-over from previous cycles: git lock removal, batch commit of 556 files, Vercel redeploy, rate limiting implementation on API routes, fallback data for 3 API routes
BLOCKER (critical, 9th consecutive report): Git locks prevent all deploys. Command to fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 52 batch' && git push
Queue status: 2 pages ready to promote (Cross-Chain + DAO Governance). 104 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES still need page.tsx files built
FOMC catalyst window: Decision tomorrow 2pm ET. All crypto content should be live before then for maximum organic capture
